title: Pricing
excerpt: description: R2 Data Catalog pricing for catalog operations, compaction, and free tier details. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. R2 Data Catalog charges based on two dimensions in addition to standard [R2 storage and operations](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/pricing/): 1. **Catalog operations**: Metadata operations such as creating tables, reading table metadata, and updating table properties.
